name: create_product
description: Create a new digital product on Gumroad with a name, price, description, and optional file or URL for delivery. The product is created as unpublished by default.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the product as displayed to buyers.

parameters.name: price
parameters.description: Price in cents. Use 0 for free products or 'pay what you want' products.

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: Product description in HTML or plain text shown on the product page.
parameters.example: A collection of 200+ premium vector icons for web and mobile design.

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: URL to redirect buyers to after purchase instead of delivering a file.

parameters.name: preview_url
parameters.description: URL of a preview image or file for the product listing.

parameters.name: custom_permalink
parameters.description: Custom URL slug for the product page (e.g., 'icon-pack' becomes gum.co/icon-pack).

body.name: Premium Icon Pack
body.description: A collection of 200+ premium vector icons for web and mobile design.
